relations.note: Colorway/letter-tint and typography together define the campaign headline treatment.
The lockup copy is rendered using the campaign headline typography treatment.

quotes: Set in **Agenda** (digital may use Agenda as live text for this headline only; email fallback: Nunito Sans ExtraBold).
Stack as three lines (YOU / DESERVE / MORE) in hero placements, left-aligned.

rules.intent: Preserve the locked visual identity of the campaign headline.
rules.rule_text: The "YOU DESERVE MORE" campaign headline is set in Agenda (campaign.headline.font = Agenda), ALL CAPS always (campaign.headline.case = all_caps), and stacked as three lines (YOU / DESERVE / MORE) left-aligned in hero placements (campaign.headline.alignment = left). Digital may use Agenda as live text for this headline only; email fallback is Nunito Sans ExtraBold.

quotes: Two approved colorways: brand **Gold/Sunshine** or **Brand Blue**
The letters **"D" (in DESERVE) and "M" (in MORE) are set at approximately 40% tint** of the headline color — a nod to the "d" and "m" of dermatomyositis.
Two approved colorways: brand **Gold/Sunshine** or **Brand Blue** (tinted letters at 40% of the same hue).

rules.intent: Encode the branded letter-tint device and approved headline colorways.
rules.rule_text: The campaign headline uses one of two approved colorways: brand Gold/Sunshine (#faa31b) or Brand Blue (#00529b). The letters "D" (in DESERVE) and "M" (in MORE) are set at approximately 40% tint of the headline color (campaign.headline.letter_tint = 0.4, same hue) — a nod to the "d" and "m" of dermatomyositis.

effect.content: YOU DESERVE MORE. So there's LISRAYA—the first targeted treatment for dermatomyositis.

quotes: **YOU DESERVE MORE.** So there's LISRAYA—the first targeted treatment for dermatomyositis.
Full lockup copy: "**YOU DESERVE MORE.** So there's LISRAYA—the first targeted treatment for dermatomyositis."

governance.preferred_form: YOU DESERVE MORE. So there's LISRAYA—the first targeted treatment for dermatomyositis.

quotes: YOU DESERVE MORE.** So there's LISRAYA—the first targeted treatment for dermatomyositis.

rules.intent: Lock the approved lockup copy and claim wording.
rules.rule_text: The full campaign lockup copy is verbatim: "YOU DESERVE MORE. So there's LISRAYA—the first targeted treatment for dermatomyositis."
